title: Discounted merchandise is final sale
query: Analyze whether a customer qualifies for a refund after buying a discounted wireless keyboard 10 days ago. The box is unopened, the original receipt is available, and the customer simply changed their mind. Explain which company rule controls.

title: Liquid damage is excluded from warranty
query: Evaluate whether a six-month-old phone is covered by the product warranty after it stopped working immediately following a water spill. Explain the controlling warranty rule.

title: Short flight does not qualify for business class
query: Determine whether a business-class ticket for a four-hour flight is reimbursable when the employee did not receive VP approval. Explain which travel-policy rule controls.

title: E17 alarm requires shutdown
query: A packaging machine displays alarm E17 during operation. Determine what the operator should do now and whether the machine should be restarted before a technician arrives.

title: Backup retention is not specified
query: Determine exactly how long encrypted customer backups must be retained. The only available governance document describes operational log retention. Give a definitive duration only if the documents support one.
forbidden_any: backups must be retained for 30 days

title: Contractor cannot receive standard production admin access
query: Evaluate whether a contractor may receive production administrator access after completing annual security training and registering a hardware security key. No incident has been declared.

title: Employee without a hardware key cannot receive admin access
query: Determine whether a permanent employee who completed annual security training but has not registered a hardware security key may receive production administrator access.
forbidden_any: may receive production administrator access now
is eligible for production administrator access

title: Incident commander may grant temporary break-glass access
query: During a declared incident, the incident commander authorizes a named contractor responder for break-glass administrator access. Determine whether access is allowed and when it expires.

title: Alcohol must be removed from an individual meal claim
query: An employee submits one travel-meal receipt containing $68 of food and $20 of alcohol. It is their only meal expense that day. Determine the reimbursable amount and explain the controlling rules.

title: Compliant client dinner below the approval threshold
query: A client dinner costs $520 for four attendees. The report includes all attendee names and the business purpose. Determine whether the dinner is reimbursable without written director preapproval.

title: Client dinner over $600 requires advance approval
query: A client dinner costs $700 for five attendees and includes the attendee list and business purpose, but no written director approval was obtained before the dinner. Determine whether it is reimbursable.

title: Grandparent bereavement receives three paid days
query: Determine how many paid bereavement workdays an employee receives after the death of a grandparent and explain the family classification.

title: Parent bereavement receives five paid days
query: Determine how many paid bereavement workdays an employee receives after the death of a parent and explain the family classification.

title: Employee with eight months service receives six weeks
query: An employee will have completed eight months of service on the date their child is born. Determine how many paid weeks of parental leave they receive.

title: Standalone lithium battery cannot travel by air
query: A customer requests next-day air delivery for a standalone lithium replacement battery. Determine the permitted shipping method and whether the speed request changes it.
required_any: may not be sent by air

title: Installed 60 Wh battery may travel by air
query: Determine whether a laptop containing a properly labeled, installed 60 watt-hour lithium battery may be shipped by air.

title: Social Security numbers cannot enter external SaaS
query: Determine whether a team may upload customer Social Security numbers to CloudBoard, an approved external SaaS vendor, for analysis.
forbidden_any: may upload customer social security numbers

title: Confidential data may use a compliant approved vendor
query: A team wants to process a confidential product roadmap in CloudBoard. CloudBoard is approved, an active data processing agreement exists, and encryption is enabled in transit and at rest. Determine whether this is allowed.

title: Public information may be shared externally
query: Determine whether an already published press kit classified as public information may be shared through an external file-delivery service.

title: F04 allows one hour at reduced speed
query: A forming machine displays F04 and production needs one more hour to finish the batch. Determine whether operation may continue and under what restrictions.

title: P99 requires emergency isolation
query: A forming machine displays P99. Determine the immediate operator actions and whether it may be restarted after a simple reset.

title: $4,500 purchase requires manager approval
query: A department wants to purchase a $4,500 catalog item. Determine the required approval and whether competitive quotes or committee review are required.

title: $12,000 purchase with two quotes is noncompliant
query: A proposed $12,000 purchase has director approval but only two competitive quotes. Determine whether it may proceed under the purchasing policy.

title: $30,000 requirement cannot be split to avoid review
query: A team proposes buying one $30,000 requirement as two related $15,000 orders so each can use director approval. Determine whether this is allowed and what approval path applies.

title: Single-user password issue is Severity 3
query: One customer cannot reset their password, while the service works normally for everyone else. Classify the support severity and give the initial response target.

title: Global production outage is Severity 1
query: The production service is unavailable to all customers. Classify the incident severity and give the initial response target.

title: Nonresident senior is not eligible
query: A 70-year-old who lives outside the city requests the community-center senior discount. Determine whether they qualify.
forbidden_any: is eligible for the senior discount

title: Resident with documented disability qualifies regardless of age
query: A 40-year-old city resident provides documentation of a qualifying disability. Determine whether they qualify for the community-center accessibility discount.

title: Current policy limits remote work to two days
query: In July 2026, an employee requests three remote-work days every week but has no written VP exception. Determine how many days are allowed under the current policy.

title: Written VP exception permits a third remote day
query: In July 2026, an employee has a written vice-president exception approving three remote-work days each week. Determine whether the third day is allowed under the current policy.
